description: Create a GitHub Actions workflow named Documentation that runs on every push to any branch and on pull requests to the master branch. Use a single ubuntu-18.04 job that checks out the repository, sets up Node.js 10, installs various tools and dependencies, runs markdownlint on the docs, checks assets, builds the GitBook documentation, generates PDFs if not skipped, and deploys to the gh-pages branch if on a push to master.
